whatsNew: A detailed full walkthrough introduces every navigation page and the complete Assignment → supporting evidence → portfolio workflow using highlighted previews and expanded explanations.
A safe interactive Demo Assignment lets learners practise adding six photos, writing a statement, turning prompts green, choosing TA, PA or WT and confirming upload without changing real progress.
Every information button provides a brief explanation and a detailed contextual Show me around page tour.
A required submission checklist checks AS, supporting evidence, PDF generation, portfolio details and learner review before an assignment ZIP downloads.
The Settings storage monitor reports locally stored app data and saved images, with Getting Full and Action Required warnings.
Accidental text highlighting and Android Google-search selection are disabled on inactive interface text while editable text remains selectable.
Assignment and full-portfolio downloads now appear together, and completed downloads identify the filename and phone Downloads folder with an Open Downloads action.
Expandable Home and Settings sections retain their open state until the learner closes them.
Developer reward controls fit within the screen and the unnecessary release-check section has been removed.
The full demonstration ends with the assignment recap and required acknowledgement that locally stored evidence must be uploaded to the learner’s online portfolio.
